mapper.select: SELECT pd.product_detail_id, pd.product_id, pd.stock_id, pd.product_detail_content FROM product_detail_tb pd LEFT JOIN product_tb p ON p.product_id = pd.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_tb pc ON pc.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN category_tb c ON c.category_detail_id = p.category_detail_id WHERE pd.product_detail_id = #{productDetailId}
